NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER IMPOSING SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 12/15/2003 TO RICHARD E. ROBY, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN BALDOCCHI. (212)

Motion To Vacate Order Imposing Sanctions, And Continuing Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order Imposing Sanctions issued on 12/15/2003 to Richard E. Roby, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Baldocchi. (212)
